title: Advanced Data Structures
description: A rigorous course covering trees, graphs, hashing, complexity, and real-world data modeling patterns.

title: Biomedical Research Methods
description: Experimental design, literature review, clinical ethics, and research documentation for biomedical programs.

title: Financial Modeling Studio
description: Spreadsheet modeling, forecasting, valuation, scenario analysis, and presentation of financial assumptions.

title: Digital Illustration Systems
description: Visual systems, digital composition, narrative illustration, and critique-centered creative production.

title: Applied Ethics and Policy
description: A seminar on ethical frameworks, civic institutions, public accountability, and decision making.

title: Robotics Control Lab
description: Hands-on control systems, kinematics, sensors, embedded programming, and autonomous lab challenges.

title: Environmental Systems
description: Ecosystems, climate patterns, field sampling, sustainability models, and systems-level environmental thinking.

title: Brand Strategy Workshop
description: Brand positioning, market research, narrative systems, launch planning, and campaign evaluation.

title: Modern Theater Practice
description: Performance practice, stage movement, ensemble critique, lighting basics, and contemporary theater methods.

title: Public Policy Analysis
description: Policy design, stakeholder mapping, evidence review, implementation tradeoffs, and civic impact measurement.

title: Machine Learning Foundations
description: Regression, classification, model evaluation, feature design, and responsible machine learning foundations.

title: Creative Writing Seminar
description: Workshop-driven writing practice with close reading, peer critique, revision strategy, and portfolio development.
